policy-mechanism.title: 政策传导机制示意图
policy-mechanism.template: Schematic diagram showing policy transmission: {POLICY} -> {CHANNEL} -> {OUTCOME}. Style: clean infographic, blue-gray palette, white background, suitable for academic paper figure 1, 16:9 aspect ratio, with arrows and labeled boxes. Chinese labels: {labels}.
policy-mechanism.example: POLICY=央行降准, CHANNEL=银行间流动性, OUTCOME=企业信贷成本下降, labels=降准 -> 流动性 -> 信贷成本

game-theory-payoff.title: 博弈论 payoff matrix 可视化
game-theory-payoff.template: Game-theoretic payoff matrix visualization with two players ({PLAYER_A} vs {PLAYER_B}), strategies {STRATEGIES}, drawn as a 2x2 grid. Highlight the Nash equilibrium cell ({EQUILIBRIUM}). Academic figure style, monochrome with one accent color, sans-serif typography, 1:1 aspect ratio.
game-theory-payoff.example: PLAYER_A=Firm 1, PLAYER_B=Firm 2, STRATEGIES=High/Low price, EQUILIBRIUM=(Low, Low)

concept-illustration.title: 经管核心概念示意图
concept-illustration.template: Conceptual illustration of {CONCEPT} in economics/management. Clean vector-art style, isometric perspective, soft pastel palette, suitable for textbook figure or graphical abstract. Annotation: {ANNOTATION}. Avoid photo-realism. 16:9.
concept-illustration.example: CONCEPT=信息不对称 (information asymmetry), ANNOTATION=买方知情度 < 卖方知情度

graphical-abstract.title: Graphical Abstract
graphical-abstract.template: Graphical abstract for an academic paper titled '{TITLE}'. Show input data ({DATA}), method ({METHOD}), and key finding ({FINDING}) flowing left-to-right. Three labeled panels with arrows. Top journals visual standard (Nature/Science style), restrained palette, sans-serif Arial, 16:9, white background.
graphical-abstract.example: TITLE=平台经济中的网络外部性, DATA=平台交易面板, METHOD=DiD with synthetic control, FINDING=用户规模每翻倍商家收益+12%

poster-background.title: 学术海报背景
poster-background.template: Academic poster background for an economics/management conference (e.g., AEA / AOM / SMS). Theme: {THEME}. Subtle geometric pattern, low contrast, large empty central area for text and figures, predominantly {COLOR_PALETTE} palette. 3:4 portrait orientation.
poster-background.example: THEME=数字经济与共同富裕, COLOR_PALETTE=blue-and-gold

policy-brief-cover.title: 政策简报封面
policy-brief-cover.template: Policy brief cover image. Title overlay placeholder: '{BRIEF_TITLE}'. Issuing institution: {INSTITUTION}. Visual motif: {MOTIF}. Modern, clean, government-publication style. 8.5x11 portrait. Color scheme: {COLOR_SCHEME}.
policy-brief-cover.example: BRIEF_TITLE=碳市场扩围对工业部门的影响, INSTITUTION=清华大学产业研究院, MOTIF=工厂剪影 + 上升曲线, COLOR_SCHEME=深蓝 + 翠绿

supply-demand-curve.title: 供需曲线图
supply-demand-curve.template: Stylized supply-and-demand chart with {GOOD} on a price-quantity plane. Show shifts caused by {SHIFT_CAUSE}, label new equilibrium ({NEW_EQUILIBRIUM}). Black axes, two color-coded curves, labeled E and E'. Academic textbook figure style, 4:3.
supply-demand-curve.example: GOOD=新能源汽车, SHIFT_CAUSE=补贴退坡 (negative demand shock), NEW_EQUILIBRIUM=lower P, lower Q

isoquant-isocost.title: 等产量线 + 等成本线
isoquant-isocost.template: Isoquant-isocost diagram for a firm minimizing cost of producing {OUTPUT_LEVEL}. Two factor inputs on axes ({INPUT_X}, {INPUT_Y}). Show several isoquants and one tangent isocost line; mark the optimal mix at {OPTIMUM}. Microeconomics textbook style, 1:1, sans-serif labels.

phillips-curve-style.title: 菲利普斯曲线 (含预期偏移)
phillips-curve-style.template: Phillips curve diagram: x-axis unemployment rate, y-axis inflation rate. Show short-run downward-sloping curve and a vertical long-run NAIRU line at {NAIRU}. Indicate a shift caused by {SHIFT}. Macroeconomics textbook style, 4:3, two accent colors.
phillips-curve-style.example: NAIRU=u*=5%, SHIFT=供给冲击 (oil price spike)

term-structure-yield-curve.title: 利率期限结构 (yield curve)
term-structure-yield-curve.template: Yield curve plot for {COUNTRY} {DATE_RANGE}. Maturity (3M-30Y) on x-axis, yield % on y-axis. Compare {COMPARISON}. Highlight inversion if any. Bloomberg-style, two-color, dark background optional. 16:9.
term-structure-yield-curve.example: COUNTRY=US Treasury, DATE_RANGE=2022 vs 2024, COMPARISON=2022 normal vs 2024 inverted

network-effects.title: 网络效应 / 平台经济示意图
network-effects.template: Network-effects illustration: a growing graph with {N_NODES} nodes representing platform users, edges representing interactions. Show {SIDE_A} side and {SIDE_B} side connected through the platform. Annotate Metcalfe-style value growth. Vector infographic, blue accent, 16:9.

risk-contagion.title: 风险传染 / 系统性金融风险图
risk-contagion.template: Systemic-risk contagion diagram across financial institutions. Nodes = {INSTITUTIONS}, edges = exposure links, edge thickness ~ exposure size. Highlight epicenter at {EPICENTER}. Use a heat gradient (green->yellow->red) for stress level. Academic finance figure style, 16:9.
risk-contagion.example: INSTITUTIONS=large banks, shadow banks, money market funds, EPICENTER=Bank A

moral-hazard.title: 道德风险 / 委托代理示意图
moral-hazard.template: Principal-agent / moral-hazard schematic. Two actors ({PRINCIPAL} and {AGENT}) with hidden action {HIDDEN_ACTION}. Show information asymmetry with a dashed boundary. Highlight {INCENTIVE_FIX} as the contractual remedy. Clean infographic, 4:3.
moral-hazard.example: PRINCIPAL=投资人, AGENT=基金经理, HIDDEN_ACTION=风险偏好, INCENTIVE_FIX=业绩报酬 + 跟投
